setup.title: 3am Setup
setup.tokenGenerated: Your auth token has been generated. Save it now — it will not be shown again.
setup.saveAndContinue: I have saved this token — Continue
setup.recoverFooter: To recover a lost token, run npx 3am deploy again or check ~/.config/3am/credentials.
setup.enterTokenBody: Your auth token was previously set up but is not present in this browser. Enter your token to continue. You can find it in ~/.config/3am/credentials or from when you first deployed.
setup.claimBody: This receiver now uses secure one-time sign-in links instead of showing a reusable auth token in the browser.
setup.claimFooter: Open the sign-in link printed by npx 3am deploy, or generate a fresh one from a trusted machine with npx 3am auth-link.
setup.failedBody: Could not connect to the receiver to complete setup.
setup.failedFooter: If this persists, make sure the receiver is running and open a fresh sign-in link from npx 3am auth-link.

contentLanguage.title: Content Language
contentLanguage.helper: UI labels stay in English. This only changes narrative content and prose.
contentLanguage.englishDetail: Recommended if you want the diagnosis and evidence copy in English.
contentLanguage.japaneseDetail: Use Japanese for generated narrative and operator-facing prose.

preferences.title: Content Language
preferences.copy: Choose the language for generated narrative and prose. UI labels remain in English.
preferences.englishDetail: Best if you want incident summaries and recommendations in English.
preferences.japaneseDetail: Use Japanese for generated narrative and diagnostic prose.

shell.selectIncident: Select an incident from the map
shell.selectIncidentEvidence: Select an incident to view evidence

immediateAction.title: Immediate Action
immediateAction.directionalIntro: Use this as the safest next move with current evidence, not as a confirmed remediation.

confidence.title: Current confidence
confidence.defaultRisk: Early narrative can shift as more corroborating evidence lands.

evidenceEntry.title: Evidence
evidenceEntry.priorityReady: Use this to verify the diagnosis against raw traces, metrics, and logs.
evidenceEntry.priorityPending: Use this first while diagnosis is incomplete.

diagnosisPending.defaultSubtext: The incident is visible now. The diagnosis narrative usually follows once evidence links settle.
diagnosisPending.openEvidenceLabel: Open Evidence Studio from diagnosis status
diagnosisPending.rerunPendingNote: Diagnosis is already running. Stay on the evidence lanes until this run finishes.
diagnosisPending.rerunDefaultNote: Use this to request one new diagnosis run from the current incident evidence.

rerun.requested: Diagnosis re-run requested. This board will refresh automatically.
rerun.alreadyRunning: Diagnosis is already running. This board will refresh automatically.
rerun.failed: Could not start a new diagnosis run. Try again in a moment.
rerun.label: Re-run diagnosis
rerun.alreadyRunningNote: Diagnosis is already running. Stay on the evidence lanes until this run finishes.
rerun.defaultNote: Use this to request one new diagnosis run from the current incident evidence.

close.requested: Incident closed. It will be permanently deleted after the retention window.
close.failed: Could not close the incident. Try again in a moment.
close.confirmMessage: Close {{id}}? This marks the incident as resolved.

confirmedNow.severity: {{severity}} severity and incident timing are confirmed.
confirmedNow.blastRadiusVisible_one: {{count}} impacted service path already visible in blast radius.
confirmedNow.blastRadiusVisible_other: {{count}} impacted service paths already visible in blast radius.
confirmedNow.blastRadiusReserved: The blast-radius panel is reserved and will fill as affected paths are confirmed.
confirmedNow.evidenceAvailable: {{traces}} traces, {{metrics}} metrics, and {{logs}} logs can already be inspected.
confirmedNow.evidenceStudioOpen: Evidence Studio is open now, even while correlation is still collecting its first signals.

notYetConfirmed.rootCause: A durable root-cause narrative until traces, metrics, and logs agree on the same trigger.
notYetConfirmed.dependency: Whether the first visible dependency is the cause or only adjacent impact.
notYetConfirmed.confidence: Full confidence language and downstream propagation timing.

nextSteps.openEvidence: Open Evidence Studio and inspect the first failing trace before broad remediation.
nextSteps.useNextStep: Use the next operator step as a safe triage move, not as final root cause confirmation.
nextSteps.reserveRerun: Reserve re-run diagnosis for when the retry API becomes available.

boardState.diagnosisPending: Severity, timing, and evidence lanes are visible now. The diagnosis narrative is still being assembled.
boardState.diagnosisUnavailable: A narrative diagnosis could not be produced. Confirmed telemetry remains available for manual review.
boardState.evidenceEmpty: Evidence lanes are prepared, but the first traces, metrics, and log clusters are still arriving.
boardState.evidenceSparse: A preliminary diagnosis is available. Treat it as provisional until more evidence fills in the gaps.
boardState.baselineInsufficient: Observed behavior is visible now; expected baseline coverage is still limited.
boardState.baselineUnavailable: Observed behavior is visible now; no reliable baseline is attached yet.
boardState.default: Core incident context is visible. Supporting evidence is still maturing.

pending.headline: Impact is confirmed. Diagnosis narrative is still taking shape.
pending.action: Start with the evidence lanes below and verify the first failing request before taking broad remediation steps.
pending.rootCause: A root-cause narrative will appear after traces, metrics, and logs align on the same explanation.
pending.blastRadius: Service impact will expand here as the system confirms which downstream paths share this failure pattern.
pending.confidence: Confidence is building from deterministic evidence. Expect a clearer score once multiple surfaces agree.
pending.checks: Use the current traces, metrics, and logs to confirm the first failing path while diagnosis continues.
pending.chain: The causal chain stays reserved until the trigger, propagation path, and user impact can be linked safely.
pending.evidence: Evidence Studio is already useful now. Counts and milestones will tighten as more telemetry is correlated.

sparse.headline: A partial diagnosis is available. Some impact is confirmed, but the full story is still forming.
sparse.action: Use the confirmed signals first, then validate any gaps before applying irreversible remediation.
sparse.rootCause: This hypothesis is preliminary. Keep validating adjacent dependencies and baseline drift.
sparse.blastRadius: Confirmed impact is shown here first. Additional affected paths will appear as telemetry fills in.
sparse.confidence: Confidence remains intentionally conservative until more than one evidence surface agrees.
sparse.checks: Prioritize checks that validate the currently confirmed trigger and rule out nearby false positives.
sparse.chain: Only the confirmed segment of the chain is shown. Upstream and downstream links remain open.
sparse.evidence: Evidence Studio contains the strongest confirmed signals now; other lanes remain open for comparison.

unavailable.headline: No narrative diagnosis was produced for this incident.
unavailable.action: Use the confirmed evidence surfaces to decide the next operator step.
unavailable.rootCause: A root-cause narrative is not available. Review the confirmed telemetry instead.
unavailable.blastRadius: Blast radius will expand here if additional affected paths are confirmed.
unavailable.confidence: Confidence cannot be summarized automatically yet.
unavailable.checks: Use Evidence Studio to verify the first failing path and dependency behavior.
unavailable.chain: The causal chain is intentionally withheld until the system can connect the steps safely.
unavailable.evidence: Evidence Studio remains the best place to review confirmed traces, metrics, and logs.

guide.message: This view shows the evidence behind the diagnosis. Start with the Prepared Read above, then explore Traces, Metrics, and Logs.

evidence.contextBarFallback: Evidence Studio is waiting for a diagnosis narrative.
evidence.designGapFallback: Dependency failure observed but no retry/backoff pattern detected in logs.

banner.diagnosisPending: Evidence Studio is live while diagnosis assembles
banner.diagnosisUnavailable: Evidence Studio remains available without a narrative diagnosis
banner.diagnosisPendingBody: Use the confirmed traces and logs first. Metrics, confidence wording, and the final narrative will tighten as correlation completes.
banner.evidenceSparseBody: The strongest confirmed signals are shown first. Treat missing lanes as open questions, not as healthy evidence.
banner.diagnosisUnavailableBody: Confirmed telemetry remains reviewable here. The system is withholding narrative claims it cannot support.
banner.coverageMaturingBody: Observed behavior is available now, but baseline or comparison coverage is still limited.

visibleNow.proofCards_one: {{count}} proof card already points to confirmed evidence.
visibleNow.proofCards_other: {{count}} proof cards already point to confirmed evidence.
visibleNow.qaSummary: {{traces}} traces, {{metrics}} metrics, and {{logs}} logs are currently summarized in the Q&A frame.
visibleNow.tracesAvailable: Traces can be opened now to inspect the first failing path.
visibleNow.tracesReserved: Trace lane stays reserved and will populate as the first captured request arrives.

stillPreparing.metricsPresent: Metric comparison is already present and will sharpen as more samples arrive.
stillPreparing.metricsWaiting: Metric comparison will appear once drift repeats across enough samples.
stillPreparing.logsPresent: Log clusters are visible now; absence evidence may still be added.
stillPreparing.logsWaiting: Log clusters will pin confirmed patterns and absences here once correlation completes.
stillPreparing.baselineReady: Baseline context is attached and may still expand with more comparable requests.
stillPreparing.baselineOpen: Expected baseline remains open, so recovery and comparison guidance stays provisional.

qa.label: Question and answer
qa.inputLabel: Ask a grounded question about this incident
qa.emptyTranscript: Ask a follow-up to pressure-test the diagnosis, clarify an uncertainty, or jump to the evidence you need next.
qa.qaUnavailable: Grounded Q&A is unavailable for this incident. The evidence surfaces below remain available.

sideRail.label: Contextual notes
sideRail.confidenceReady: Narrative confidence is still being refined from the current evidence mix.
sideRail.confidencePending: Confidence will appear here once multiple evidence surfaces agree on the same explanation.
sideRail.uncertaintyUnavailable: No expected baseline is attached yet, so treat observed slowdowns and failures as preliminary rather than fully comparative.
sideRail.uncertaintyDefault: Open questions will stay pinned here while the system separates confirmed facts from still-unresolved possibilities.
sideRail.dependenciesDefault: Dependency notes stay pinned here as trace and log correlation confirms what is truly involved.

traces.emptyObserved: Observed trace lane is reserved. Deterministic trace evidence will appear here when telemetry arrives.
traces.limitedTraces: Only limited traces are available for this incident.
traces.noBaseline: No baseline trace has been attached to this incident window yet.
traces.baselineTooSparse: Baseline comparison is still too sparse to render expected behavior safely.

metrics.emptyReserved: Metric comparison is reserved. As soon as the incident repeats across enough samples, expected vs observed drift will appear here.
metrics.thinSignal: Only a thin metric signal is available so far. Keep this lane open for confirming or disproving the current hypothesis.

logs.emptyReserved: Log clusters are reserved here. When the first repeated pattern or notable absence is confirmed, it will pin into this lane.
logs.sparseEvidence: Log evidence is still sparse. Treat this lane as open for corroboration rather than as proof of health.

empty.noRecentSpansWithIncidents: No recent spans in the live window.
empty.noSpansYet: No spans observed yet in this environment.
empty.detailWithIncidents: Open incidents still exist below. Use one to inspect preserved incident evidence while the runtime map waits for fresh traffic.
empty.detailNoIncidents: The map only draws observed call paths from spans. Once traffic arrives, entry points, runtime units, and dependencies will appear here.
empty.noPreservedSpans: No preserved incident spans were available to reconstruct a scoped map.

statusBanner.incidentScopedFallback: This is incident-scoped fallback, not an inferred topology.
